title: Internal error: Consumer doesn't match lhs of assign
body:
Hi there,

I'm running v4.106 in `--lint-only` mode and am getting the following internal error.

```
INFO: Building simulation model
verilator -f tigris_system_tigris_0.1.vc -Wall
%Error: Internal Error: ../src/tigris_system_io_0.1/src_rtl/tigris_io.sv:269:21: ../V3Gate.cpp:1099: Consumer doesn't match lhs of assign
  269 |                    .DVDD(VDDD33_io),
      |                     ^~~~
                        ... See the manual and https://verilator.org for more assistance.
```

The line in question is a power rail for an IO cell.  I've created a version of the Verilog cell views with nothing but port declarations for lint use so there's nothing at the end of this net.  It's a top level port that feeds all cells and is declared as an `inout` throughout the hierarchy.

Any pointers as to what to look for?
